title: Traditional British Beef Shin Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with slow-cooked beef shin, perfect for a cold winter's day.

ingredients.name: Festive spices
ingredients.notes: A mix of cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef shin pieces in batches, then set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chopped potato, festive spices, and brown gravy mix. Stir to combine.
Add the browned beef shin back to the pot, along with the stout beer.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the stew for 2.5 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
